task: Force Harness governance bootstrap and completion guard across LLM execution paths

governance_bootstrap.summary: Checked Harness operating directive, completion verification rule, Red Team trigger semantics, and deploy source of truth expectations.
Checked common LLM non-negotiables, real-entrypoint verification duty, and completion evidence guard requirement.

verification.name: completion guard and governance bootstrap regression tests
git hook and script syntax validation

verification.name: macmini completion guard and bootstrap tests
